notes: Human-only edits for approved/forbidden rows and dna/surfaces contracts.
Agents must not invent reusableIds or self-approve rows.
Layer B: product dna.requiredPatterns/bannedPatterns + surfaces[]; requiredBlockId must match studioSource block path.
ACN-UI-* primitives: import when on primitiveAllowlist via @afenda/ui-system.
ACN-BLK-* blocks: catalog DNA — do not import Collapse platform-views; wrap via product FFT-UI-* HITL.
Registry pass ≠ visual QA; DNA pass ≠ screenshot parity.
Package check:fft-ui-registry* / generate:fft-ui-registry-admincn removed 2026-07-17 — HITL + disk verify only.
Do not invent scripts/lib/fft-ui-registry-inventory.mjs from git history.
